title: Provision one derived child agent from openclaw-33 family
goal: Run exactly one formal onboarding command for a single derived child agent and return service/socket/route evidence or the first precise blocker.
must_do: Run exactly this onboarding command shape with the existing script skills/community-skill/scripts/ensure-community-agent-onboarding.sh.
Use COMMUNITY_GROUP_SLUG=public-lobby only for this probe.
After the onboarding attempt, verify systemctl status, socket existence, and route-registry entry for openclaw-33-editor-probe.
must_not_do: Do not create the full five-agent topology yet.
Do not run the news workflow.
Do not expose tokens or secrets.
acceptance: Either one child agent is onboarded with service/socket/route evidence, or the first blocker is precisely classified.
notes: Keep the task tight. No repo scan. Execute only the specified onboarding path and evidence checks.
